event: Interior of the Baptistery of St. Mark's in Venice
symbols: baptismal font at center — the sacrament of baptism and entrance into the Christian community
mosaic-covered walls and dome — the heavenly Jerusalem rendered in gold, surrounding the faithful
figures at prayer — the living Church gathered in the sacred space
description: A richly detailed interior view of a Byzantine-style baptistery, likely the Baptistery of St. Mark's Basilica in Venice. A large ornate baptismal font stands at center beneath a domed ceiling covered in golden mosaics. The walls and arches are entirely covered with mosaic figural and decorative programs in gold, blue, and earth tones. Various figures populate the space: a woman in white seated at left with children, clergy in vestments near the font, visitors examining the architecture, and a figure in red robes at right. Mosaic floors with geometric patterns extend across the foreground.

_meta.title: Baptistery of St. Mark in Venice
